description: Add selective Axiom Foundation interoperability for source-section metadata, source hash staleness checks, RuleSpec identity bridging, bill/Hansard linkage scaffolding, and integration documentation.
oracle_notes: Repo-side offline helpers, documentation, fixture tests, focused Ruff validation, and rulespec-nz layout compatibility checks are implemented. Live Axiom runtime execution, repository vendoring, and rulespec-nz content generation remain out of scope.
